Lets take a very basic example from maths. Counting 0 to 9 hi kyu hai. 22 4 hi kyu hai. Wydyarthi ka prashn bahut sundar hai. Mainebhi life men extraordinary safalta prapt ki hai. Isliye iska raj jan saka hun. Pahli bat. Safalta ka rasta bahut bahut aasan hai. Saflta na bahut mehnat karne se aati hai, na junun se aata hai, na balance in life se aata hai, na kai kam ek sath karne se aata hai, etc. Ye sare upai sarasar jhuth hain. Safalta rani milti hai consistency se. Ise wyawhar me kaise laoge? Nind puri karo, tab utho. Ghari se koi matlab mat rakho. 30 minutes men taiar ho jao aur study table par aa jao. Rum band kar lo. Mobile ko off kar do, internet ko disconnect kar do, aur ghar walon ko bata do ki koi 4 hr tak door knock na kare. Tum kya pura karna chahte ho, yah pichhli rat ko hi tay kar lena. Study par concentrate karo, aur minute se pahle mat hilo. Ab tum aazad ho masti karne ke liye agle 20 hr tak. Isi shedule ko repeat karo agle 3, days tak bina ek din ka bhi naga kiye hue. Tum duniya ke ek aadmi ban jaoge.

Yeh movie aam logon par nahi, balki un radical groups aur dhokhebaazon par bani hai jo apna hidden agenda chalane ke liye dharam ka naam kharab karte hain. 'Jhatpat Bollywood' ka maksad kisi community par sawal uthana nahi, balki un chand bure logon ki asliyat dikhana hai jo masoom ladkiyon ko apne jaal mein fasate hain. Aapke hisaab se in extremist logon ko dharam ka naam kharab karne se rokne ka sabse sahi tarika kya hai? Apne vichar zaroor share karein aur channel ke sath aise hi jude rahein!
